scripts.preinstall: node -e "try { require('fs').unlinkSync('package-lock.json'); require('fs').unlinkSync('yarn.lock'); } catch {}" && node -e "if (!/pnpm/.test(process.env.npm_config_user_agent)) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1) }"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
